sections.text: Fluid pipes transport liquids and gases between machines and tanks. Each material has a throughput limit, temperature rating, and channel count. Larger pipe sizes carry more fluid per tick. Some materials support multiple channels, allowing different fluids through the same pipe.
Potin fluid pipes have very high throughput for their cost and material tier. Wooden pipes burn if they carry steam.

Size	Throughput Multiplier
Tiny	1x
Small	2x
Normal	6x
Large	12x
Huge	24x
